problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
